name: Slow-Cooker Tamale Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Stew meat, cut into cubes
1 Mild green chile pepper, seeded and chopped
1 can (8 oz) Diced ripe olives, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring broth or bouillion to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Stirring constantly, slowly add cornmeal. Simmer mixture for 5 minutes, stirring often.
3. Stir in cilantro. Grease a spatula and spread the cornmeal mixture on the bottom and about 2 inches up the sides of the slow cooker.
4. In a large bowl, combine sausage, stew meat, onion, celery, chile pepper, sun-dried tomatoes, diced olives, salt, and pepper.
5. Carefully spoon the mixture into the center of the cornmeal-lined pot.
6. Cover and cook on LOW for 7 to 8 hours.
7. Garnish with ripe olives, if desired. Makes 6 or 7 servings.
